CREATE TABLE networks (id INT PRIMARY KEY, subnet INET);
SELECT sys.broadcast(subnet) FROM networks WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.broadcast(subnet) FROM networks WHERE subnet LIKE '192.%';
SELECT sys.broadcast(subnet) FROM networks WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM networks WHERE subnet LIKE '10.%');
CREATE TABLE devices (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip INET);
SELECT d.id, sys.broadcast(n.subnet) FROM devices d JOIN networks n ON d.ip BETWEEN n.subnet AND sys.broadcast(n.subnet);
SELECT n.id, sys.broadcast(n.subnet) AS broadcast FROM networks n WHERE sys.broadcast(n.subnet) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT s.broadcast FROM (SELECT sys.broadcast(subnet) AS broadcast FROM networks) s WHERE s.broadcast = inet '192.168.1.255';
